publishedAbstract: The build of.NET application fails with following error: ~~~ I0106 01:03:56.4432731 1 sti.go:697] Response status code does not indicate success: 504 (Gateway Time-out). I0106 01:03:57.244261 1 sti.go:697] Retrying 'FindPackagesByIdAsyncCore' for source 'https://nexus-repository.example.com/repository/nuget-group/FindPackagesById()?id='System.Linq.Expressions'&semVerLevel=2.0.0'. ~~~
publishedTitle: .NET v2.2 build fails with server error 504 (Gateway Time-out) when pulling packages
